{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch tappe ſawa
Kappâ aprakts Usajus Dahrsâ /
un wiꞥſa Dehls Josijus tappe
par Kehninu winna Weetâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXII. Nodalla.
Josijus tas rahmê Kehniſch leek ſiprinaht /
kas fagruûs bija pee ta KUNGÂ Namma : i.
Ilkijus atrohd to Bauslibas Grahmatu : g.
Ko tas Kehniſch leek laſſiht : ii. Ta Pra-
weete Ulđa paſluddina / kas Jerusalemei un
Juhdai notiks : 14/16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Osijus bija aſtoņus kas jo tee darrija to peetizzigi.
Gaddus wezz / kad tas
par Kehninu tappe/ un
waldija trihsdefinitis un weenu
Gaddu Jerusaleme/ un winna
Mahteî bija Jedida Wahrda /
Adaja Meita no Bazkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas darrija/ kas tam
KUNGAM labbi patikke / un
ſtagaja eekſch wiſſeem Zelteemi
fawa Tehwa Dahwida / un ne
atkahpe nei pa labbo nei pa frei-
fo Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un aſotâ padeſmitâ Gad-
dâ ta Kehnina Josijus / fuhttija
tas Kehniſch Sawanu Azaltja
Dehlu/ ta Dehla Mesullanna/to
Srihweri ta KUNGÂ Nam-
mâ/ un ſazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Etj augſchain pee to Aug-
ſtu-Preesteri Ilkiju / un lat fa-
mekle to Nandu / kas ta KUN-
GA Nammâ irr nesta / ko tee
Sleegſna Sarqi no teem Lau-
dim ſakrahjuſcht/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un lat to dohd teem Dar-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem Remmescheem /
teem Namma-Darritajeem/
Muhrnekeem/ ka Kohki un g
Akmiati pirkti tohp/ to Nam-
atkat ſtriprinaht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatfchu ar teem ne ta
Lahgadiba turretâ par to Nam-
kas winnu Rohkâ bija eedo-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad ſazzija tas Augi
Preesteris Ilkijus us Sawa-
to Srihweri. Esefnu to Ba-
libas Grahmatu ta KUNG-
Nammâ atraddis. Un Ilki-
dewe Sawanain to Grahma-
ka wiꞥſch to laſſitu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Pehz nahze tas Srihi-
ris Sawans pee ta Kehnin-
un nefje winnam Wehſtis
pakkat/ un ſazzija: Tawi Ka-
irr to Naudu/ kas ta KUNG-
Nammâ atrasta ktua/ tamek-
fchi/ un to teem Darba-Peelu-
kotajeem dewufchi/ kas pahr
KUNGÂ Nammu eezełti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Srihweris G-
wans ſtahtija tam Kehnin-
arridsan/ un ſazzija: Tas Pre-
steris Ilkijus irr man wee-
Grahmatu dewts. Un Sawa-
laſſija to preeſch ta Kehnin-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
